narrative:
Precinct Avon Lake City 1-E (precinct in Lorain County) has 877 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
